name: methane snow storm
description: I'm in a methane snow storm
items_start: Strange light far to the NORTH
hints: A methane snow storm area. You see a strange light to the NORTH.
The light to the north is your navigation beacon.
Follow the light NORTH to find your way through the storm.
Go NORTH toward the light. S and W lead to the dead-end loop!
notes: Methane storm with visible light to the north. Follow the light. S and W lead to dead-end.
